[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111010 6
1 1101010001 5
2 1110001010 5
3 1101100001 5
4 1101011100 6
5 0001110110 5
6 0000100110 3
7 0111010110 6

23 32 0000111101 5
34 43 1100101010 5
45 54 0001010000 2
56 65 0111110000 5
67 76 0011111010 6 match 0
70 07 1101010001 5 match 1

13 31 0011010110 5
